- [ ] Implementation is aligned with authority design, or approved deviation is provided.

## Pre-Coding Dry Run (Required)

- [ ] Dry run completed before coding
- Dry run doc path (if stored):

## Deviation Declaration (Required)

- [ ] No deviation
- [ ] Deviation exists (provide path): `docs/deviations/<record>.md`

If deviation exists:
- Classification: Major / Minor
- Approval status:
- Reconciliation path:
  - [ ] Align code back to authority design
  - [ ] Update authority design as new source of truth
- TTL (target version/date):

## Validation

- [ ] Unit tests updated/passed (if applicable)
- [ ] Integration/contract tests updated/passed (if applicable)
- [ ] No sensitive data exposed in logs/errors/responses

## Follow-Up

- [ ] Spec task status updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Authority docs updated (if needed by approved reconciliation)
- [ ] Deviation record closed or tracked with explicit owner and due date
